message:
feat(runtime,doctor): extract TaskExecutor seam and persist doctor summary artifact

Introduce SpawnTaskExecutor and TaskExecutor enum in ftui-runtime to
decouple task execution substrate from Program, supporting both spawned
and queued (EffectQueue) lanes behind a unified interface with bounded
shutdown. In doctor_frankentui, extract doctor summary into a persisted
JSON artifact under meta/ and surface evidence links and fallback
metadata in HTML reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
